{{Infobox artifact
| name = Starlotus Bud
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Starlotus]] Bud is a spirit-fruit characterized by its striking appearance, featuring pale white petals with pink streaks that appear to be in a state of half-bloom. It possesses a visual quality similar to a [[Remnant]], looking as though it were painted onto reality with light. While its medicinal and herbal properties are considered low-grade, the fruit is highly valued for its potent spiritual power, which is derived from centuries of concentrated [[vital aura]]. [[Consuming]] the bud provides significant benefits to a practitioner's [[madra]] base and can facilitate rapid advancement in cultivation. For talented [[Copper]]-stage disciples, it is often recommended to help them transition into the [[Iron stage]]; for others, it may enable an immediate breakthrough to the [[Copper]] realm. Because of its potency, the fruit takes a considerable amount of time to digest and can cause internal swirling within a cultivator's cores during the absorption process. Although it is highly effective for strengthening one's foundation, its power is considered modest when compared to true spirit-fruits.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A [[Starlotus Bud]] is a spirit-fruit that acts as a miracle for those below the [[Copper stage]] and improves their [[madra]] base.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18">''Unsouled'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Starlotus]] bud can help [[Lindon]] break through to the [[Copper stage]] almost immediately.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Starlotus]] bud is a pale white flower with pink streaks and curled petals.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] cycled a [[Starlotus]] bud.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Starlotus]] bud is a spirit-fruit.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
